## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests were added or updated.
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated.
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes.
- [ ] Provider behavior is backed by official documentation links when applicable.
- [ ] Sandbox evidence is included when provider behavior changes.
- [ ] No provider secrets, raw card data, or frontend secret exposure were introduced.

## Provider Documentation

Link official provider documentation used by this change, or write `N/A`.

## Sandbox Evidence

Describe sandbox scenarios run, or write `N/A`.
